title: Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026 - Overview

detail.title: Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: Kerala CM Kids LSS, USS scholarship result 2026 is out at bpekerala.in. Check scorecard, cut off, qualifying marks, merit list and download result online.

content.text: Kerala LSS, USS scholarship result 2026 has been declared, and students can check their CM Kids LSS/USS exam scores online through the official website bpekerala.in. The Kerala Public Examination Section has released the CM Kids LSS Scholarship and USS Scholarship 2026 results for students who appeared in the February examination. Candidates can download their scorecard by entering their registration number and date of birth on the official portal. Those who qualify will receive annual financial assistance under the state scholarship scheme.
Click Here: Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026

sections.heading: Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026 - Overview

rows: CM Kids LSS Scholarship / CM Kids USS Scholarship 2026
Kerala Public Examination Section / Board of Public Examinations, Kerala
LSS for Class 4, USS for Class 7 students
Kerala LSS, USS scholarship result 2026 declared

sections.heading: Kerala LSS, USS Result 2026 – Important Dates

rows: Published before/along with result, as per official portal and media reports

sections.heading: Direct Link to Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026

content.text: For users with transactional intent (direct access), keep this section concise and link-focused.
Students can check the Kerala LSS, USS scholarship result 2026 through the CM Kids LSS/USS result portal hosted by the Board of Public Examinations, Kerala. The official links are:

items: Kerala CM Kids LSS, USS Result 2026 portal: bpekerala.in/lss_uss_2026
Main BPE Kerala website: bpekerala.in
Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan website: pareekshabhavan.kerala.gov.in

content.text: You can embed a “Check Result Now” CTA hyperlink to the result link to drive clicks and improve CTR.

sections.heading: How to Check Kerala LSS, USS Scholarship Result 2026 Online

content.text: This section is perfect for featured snippets and PAA-style content.
Follow the steps below to check your Kerala LSS, USS scholarship result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official website bpekerala.in.
On the homepage, open the “Results” section or click on the LSS/USS result notice.
Click on the “CM Kids LSS USS 2026 Result” link or select LSS / USS result from the list.
Enter your registration number and date of birth in the specified fields.
Submit the details to view your CM Kids LSS/USS scorecard on the screen.
Download the result PDF and take a printout for future reference.

content.text: You can also inform users that if the site is slow or down, they should retry during non-peak hours or check via pareekshabhavan.kerala.gov.in.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Kerala LSS, USS Result Scorecard

content.text: Explain the scorecard elements to reduce confusion and support users with informational intent.
After downloading the Kerala LSS, USS scholarship result 2026, students will find the following details on their scorecard:

items: Student name and registration number
School name and code
Class (LSS – Class 4, USS – Class 7)
Examination name and year (CM Kids LSS/USS 2026)
Subject-wise marks or section-wise scores
Total marks obtained and maximum marks
Qualifying status (selected / not selected / eligible for scholarship)
Any additional remarks as per the Board of Public Examinations, Kerala

content.text: Advise students to carefully verify all details and contact school authorities in case of discrepancies.
